evaluators.name: Manufacturing AI Strategy Consultation Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a 60-minute AI strategy consultation booking for a manufacturing team in October 2026, afternoon UTC, with 5 participants and a $10k–$25k budget.

evaluators.name: Mid-Size AI Transformation Package Proposal Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user requested a proposal for a mid-size AI transformation package priced at most $12k with ≥2 workshops, starting around September 2026.

evaluators.name: Retail AI Case Studies Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added 3 retail/e-commerce AI case studies (year ≥2022, ROI ≥20%, duration ≤5 months) to the reading list.

evaluators.name: AI Readiness Assessment and Recommended Service Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user completed the AI Readiness Assessment with mid-range answers across key dimensions and then created a consultation booking tied to the top recommended offering.

evaluators.name: GenAI Marketing Webinar Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered for an online GenAI-focused marketing webinar happening next month between 11:00 and 15:00 UTC.

evaluators.name: Financial Services End-to-End AI Estimate and Proposal Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a financial-services project estimate with the correct scope, modules, team size, timeline, and budget, and then submitted a proposal request linked to that estimate and a financial services end-to-end AI offering starting around May 2026.

evaluators.name: AI Governance Reading Queue Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added 3 AI governance blog posts from the last 12 months with estimated read time under 10 minutes to their reading queue.

evaluators.name: Remote EU AI Training Cheapest Program Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user chose the most affordable remote training program in Europe that can handle ~30 participants, is under $8k with at least 2 live sessions, and submitted a booking request for it with 30-person European sales team details.
